title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited!
